---
title: "BIOL 275 Lab 5 ggplot2 visualization challenge"
format: typst
output-file: lab-05-worksheet.pdf
---

## Notes

1\. Challenge 1

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 3.7in)
```
2\. Challenge 2

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 3.7in)
#pagebreak()
```
3\. Challenge 3

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 4in)
```
4\. Challenge 4

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 4in)
```
